item.title: Version 2026.03.30
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.30

  • Smart Formatting (macOS 26+) — opt-in toggle in Preferences that uses Apple's on-device Foundation Models to intelligently format transcribed speech. Adds proper punctuation, capitalization, paragraph breaks at topic changes, list formatting, filler word removal, and self-correction handling — no voice commands needed. Requires Apple Intelligence to be enabled. Falls back to the standard formatting pipeline on error. Streaming mode is automatically paused while Smart Formatting is active.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
